text:
Medina is a soldier appearing in Bahamut, the ninth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Medina is a tall dark-skinned man. He wears the Survey Corps uniform with a white tagelmust.

Story

Along with his team, Medina battles a group of Titans and confirms he is alive after. As they go back to their city, they have a conversation where Ezkebel exposes her theories, which Medina calls a conspiracy. They then witness a lightning with no cloud in the sky and head towards it, to find a Titan with a civilian. Medina attacks the Titan and Captain Makō Messer makes it run away. Medina asks if they should chase it but the captain decides not to.
